narrative:
Huber Heights 3-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 827 registered voters, with 63.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
